title: Equifax to Acquire Efficient Hire
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) announced today that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Efficient Hire, a provider of cloud recruiting, onboarding and HR management solutions. This acquisition will enable Equifax Workforce Solutions to bring employers more of the services and insights they need to help them manage amidst a rapidly changing hiring and employment landscape.

title: Why the Earnings Surprise Streak Could Continue for Equifax (EFX)
text: Equifax (EFX) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Equifax Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call for Fourth Quarter 2021 Results
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) will announce its financial results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2021, in a release to be issued on February 9 after the market closes.  Equifax will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m.

title: The Work Number® Enhances Instant Verifications Service Leveraging ICE Mortgage Technology's Encompass® Platform
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax (NYSE: EFX) announced that The Work NumberⓇ offers instant employment and income verifications service by leveraging the latest Encompass Partner Connect API platform with EncompassⓇ by ICE Mortgage Technology™, part of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a leading global provider of data, technology and market infrastructure. The technology infrastructure and simplified user interface create straightforward yet customizable pathways for loan officers to instantly tap into enhanced mortgage income and employment verification solutions from Equifax.

title: Equifax Reveals International Expansion Of Verification Services
text: Equifax Inc (NYSE: EFX) has expanded its verification services internationally, powered by its multi-year investment in the Equifax Cloud. Verification Exchange, a secure, automated cloud-based service that streamlines the process of verifying employment and income information, is now available in Australia and the U.K.

title: Equifax Expands Industry-Leading Verification Services Globally
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Equifax ® (NYSE: EFX) announced the international expansion of its industry-leading verification services, powered by the company's multi-year investment in the Equifax Cloud™. Verification Exchange™, a secure, automated cloud-based service that streamlines the process of verifying employment and income information, is now available in Australia and the United Kingdom - rapidly following the service's rollout and success in Canada and the availability of Equifax employment verification services in India.

title: Why Enerflex (EFX) Is Buying Exterran (EXTN) For $735 Million
text: Enerflex Ltd. (TSX: EFX) and Exterran Corporation (NYSE:EXTN)  announced a business combination to create a premier integrated global provider of energy infrastructure.

title: Equifax, Experian and TransUnion Extend Free Weekly Credit Reports Through End of 2022
text: ATLANTA & COSTA MESA, Calif. & CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The three nationwide credit reporting agencies – Equifax (NYSE: EFX), Experian (LON: EXPN) and TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) – are taking joint action to extend the pandemic response service offering free weekly credit reports to consumers through the end of 2022. This benefit will continue to help consumers across the country manage their financial health during the ongoing hardship and economic uncertainty caused by COVID-19. The companies' CE

title: Baird Upgrades Equifax, Views Current Valuation As 'Attractive'
text: Baird analyst Jeffrey Meuler upgraded Equifax Inc. (NYSE:EFX) to Outperform from Neutral and lowered the price target to $281 (an upside of 25%), from $290. The analyst cites the company's "exceptional" employment/income verification business, a "very good business" as one of three global credit bureaus and its modernized tech stack.

title: Equifax and Georgia Tech Announce Financial Inclusion Research Partnership
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) and the Georgia Institute of Technology ("Georgia Tech") have announced a new research partnership designed to develop new ways to reach underserved, underbanked and credit-rebuilding consumers. As part of this relationship, the Financial Services Innovation Lab at Georgia Tech will leverage anonymized Equifax data assets to further its innovative research designed to increase consumer access to credit and Equifax data scientists will provide hands-on data education to speed research time.

title: Equifax: Investor Day Outlines The Next Phase Of Value Creation
text: Equifax: Investor Day Outlines The Next Phase Of Value Creation

title: Equifax Enhances Mortgage Verification Solutions Available Through The Work NumberⓇ
text: ATLANTA, Jan. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Equifax®  (NYSE: EFX) today announced additional service enhancements to its comprehensive portfolio of verification solutions available to the mortgage industry. These new options are powered by The Work Number®, the industry-leading, centralized commercial repository of income and employment information in the United States.

title: Read Morgan Stanley' Stance On Equifax, Nielsen
text: Morgan Stanley analyst Toni Kaplan upgraded Equifax Inc. (NYSE:EFX) to Overweight from Equal Weight and raised the price target to $325 (an upside of 14%) from $264. The analyst expects Equifax's organic revenue growth to exceed most Information Services companies from 2022-2024, driven primarily by the company's Workforce Solutions segment.
